characters.description: Dominique PierreBiographical InformationAge18GenderFemaleEye ColorDark BrownHair ColorDark BrownBirthdayMarch 5th 2002StatusAliveCharacter InformationOccupationStudent (Grand Army High School)Basketball Player (formerly)HairdresserSisters Thrive InternEducationGrand Army High SchoolNicknameDomDommoRelationshipsFamilyAntoinette Pierre(mother)Unnamed fatherSabine Pierre(sister)Dante Pierre(nephew)Tristan Pierre(nephew)Odette Pierre(niece)FriendsTamika JonesTor SampsonSonia CruzJoey Del MarcoJayson JacksonRomance(s)John Ellis(boyfriend)Ronald Toussaint(ex-fiancé)PortrayalPortrayerOdley JeanSeasons1First AppearanceLast AppearanceBrooklyn, 2020FreedomDominique "Dom" Pierreis one of the main characters inNetflix'sGrand Army. She is portrayed byOdley Jean. Dominique was born to a Haitian family. She lives in East New York, an area of Brooklyn, and lives with her mom, sister, and nephews. She didn't grow up with a lot of money and her family works to make ends meet. Her family speaks Creole at home. She goes to Grand Army High School and she has a boyfriend named,John Ellis, that also attends Grand Army. Dom is very well liked at school. She is on the basketball team, has a close group of friends, and is secretly in love withJohn Ellis. Dom also does very well in school and has big plans to go to Washington University or Johns Hopkins to study psychology.

He is portrayed byAnthony Ippolito. George is a student at Grand Army high school. He is best friends with Luke and Tim and often hangs out with Joey and Tim's sister, Anna. The five of them often goof around. George is also on the swim team at school and considered one of the more popular kids.  He has hooked up with a number of girls at school and sets his eyes on Leila, after she made the "bomb pussy list". One night, after drinking at the movies, George got into a cab with Luke, Joey, and Tim. He was joking around with Joey and Luke and things went too far. He forcibly held downJoeyand fingered her, leaving bruises on her legs. To him, it was just "goofing around" and he didn't believe he did anything wrong.

She is portrayed byKeara Graves. Grace has short brown hair cut in a bob and dark brown eyes with pale skin. Grace is portrayed as rude and blunt. We see that when she asks Joey if she's had an abortion before because she thinks Joey sleeps around a lot. She gets jealous easily, as seen when she pours a drink on Leila at a party after seeing her with George, and then blaming Luke's fall on her. She is protective of Luke and George and is uncompassionate towards Joey when the news that Joey was raped by the two boys goes around.

He is portrayed byBrian Altemus. One night, after drinking at the movies, Luke got into a cab with Geo, Joey, and Tim. He was messing around with Joey and Geo and things got aggressive. He forcibly pinned downJoeyand, to the point that he left hand-prints and bruises on her, and fingered her so hard she bled. To him, it was just "goofing around" and he didn't believe he did anything wrong, as Joey had been kissing him before. Later on,Joeyaccused him andGeoof raping her, so Luke andGeogot arrested at school in front of everyone. They went to jail and claimed that they were innocent and that it was consensual, that Joey had started it. In the end, the case was dropped due to lack of evidence so they were let go.
